description:
Dorion is an alternative Discord client aimed towards lower-spec or storage-sensitive PCs that supports themes, plugins, and more!


Changes
- Greatly improve RPC process scanning performance
- Fix scanning Wine games (Linux)
  - I may have forgotten to mention this in a previous release, but RPC should now work on Linux
Other notes
Apparently shelteRPC was semi-busted and nobody told me 😠. That has been hotfixed in my shelter-plugins repo (activity assets (eg. images) won't load for now, but when shelteRPC updates to fix that, you will get the update automatically)
